rows.label: qev019402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yo! What's up?
Still earning cash as always?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Ah? You need something from me?
If it's a profitable deal, I'm in as much as you want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_JNK0010
rows.name: Request

rows.label: qev019402_SEL0011
rows.name:
Point-blank tell him you want him to hand
over the Data Unit.

rows.label: qev019402_JNK0020
rows.name: Probe

rows.label: qev019402_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask him in a roundabout way if he has
the Data Unit.

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0003
rows.name:
Data Unit FN098?! Wha—?! Where the hell did you hear
about that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0004
rows.name:
Asking strange things... It's as if I have some crucial data
regarding Frontier Net...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0006
rows.name:
Don't underestimate me. Where the hell did you hear
about that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Kirsty, you say? That hypocritical bastard finally made
it that far?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0008
rows.name:
If that's the story, I don't mind handing it over,
but I can't just hand it over easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll need roughly 100000G.
This thing is worth that much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0010
rows.name:
How about it? You should be able to earn it.
By making full use of that Frontier Net, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0011
rows.name:
How is it?
Did you get the money to buy the Data Unit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0012
rows.name: Considering the data inside this thing, 100000G is cheap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_JNK0030
rows.name: Buy

rows.label: qev019402_SEL0031
rows.name: Purchase the Data Unit for 100000G.

rows.label: qev019402_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not buy

rows.label: qev019402_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you cannot pay such an exorbitant amount.

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thanks for your patronage... Hehe, with this much, I'm
all prepared on my end too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0014
rows.name: Take this to Kirsty's place![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0015
rows.name:
I disabled all the complicated encryption so you can look
inside right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0016
rows.name: Hey, hey, don't be stingy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0017
rows.name:
I know how you operate. You've been hoarding plenty
of cash, haven't ya?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0018
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Wait, you don't have the money?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0019
rows.name:
Then increase your Research Data Probes like crazy
just like always, and gather up the cash![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0020
rows.name: So Kirsty really went and gathered all the Data Units...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev019402_MSG0021
rows.name:
Heh! Things have gotten pretty damn interesting while I
was running around making money![ST:wait ]
